commands.reloadonlydata.reload.fallback: KubeJS reload failed, fell back to vanilla; reloaded %1$s recipes in %2$s ms
commands.reloadonlydata.reload.tags.ingr: Note: tags updated, but tag-based ingredients in already-loaded recipes are still cached and won't refresh. Run /reloadrecipes next to apply.
commands.reloadonlydata.reload.tags.unkn: Unknown registry: %s (use tab-completion to see valid registries)
commands.reloadonlydata.reload.functions: Note: functions reloaded, but #function tags are not refreshed. Reload them separately if you changed function tags.
Warning: reloading registry '%s' takes effect on the server immediately, but online clients must reconnect to see the change (client registries only sync on join). Worldgen/generation-baked registries (biomes/structures/etc.) are blacklisted and cannot be reloaded (would corrupt the save). To proceed, run the command again ending with 'confirm'.
Registry '%s' was reloaded on the server. Reconnect to apply it on the client (client registries only sync when joining).
